name: User
description: Create a user with configurable identity, password, shell, and sudo access.

username.description: Name of the user to create.

configurePassword.description: Configure the account password when passwordHash is set.

passwordHash.description: Crypt-formatted password hash. Only leave blank for a password-locked account.

configureSudo.description: Grant the user password-protected sudo access. Requires passwordHash.

shell.description: Absolute path to the user's login shell.
